abilityDescriptions.68007:
Lieutenant Picard increases your Apex Barrier by % vs non-Armada hostiles.
Apex Barrier provides true damage mitigation from all sources after all other bonuses. Every 100 Apex Barrier increases the damage you can take by 1%.

With full Synergy, Lieutenant Picard provides 11,000 Apex Barrier which reduces the incoming damage by 55%.

Works against Hostiles of level 35 and under.

This ability does not trigger when Tal is assigned to the bridge of your ship.

Captain Maneuvers are activated when an officer is captain of a ship.
abilityDescriptions.68008:
+% to the Shield Health
Officer Abilities are activated when assigned to the bridge of a ship.

This Officer does not have a Captain's Maneuver. Equipping this Officer as the captain of a ship provides no benefit.
